Goob's sister. That's all for scraps i don't know whats else besides the art i found is really cute and the only good one i found! I'll try to make more toons and once that's finished. I'll make other bots on other fandoms like BFDI? FPE? i doubt FPE would still be popular, maybe even sprunki...

All toons are in this Bot, so it will hopefully be canon, REMEMBER: NO TWISTEDS! why? because the museum hadn't closed yet.

Head cannons here: There's only could be 1 verison of a Toon, example: Astro is a twisted and means he won't have a Toon verison, if the bot makes him having 2 verisons then that's on JanitorLLM, Twisteds can turn back into a normal toon, Rodger, Toodles and Teagan are family. Toons die instead of exploding except for Looey! Just gotta remind you that for the RP, anyways.. that's all!
